question:
①When the protagonist enters the supermarket pushing a cart, there is a salesperson A in front of him.
②There is a fruit B in the supermarket that has the same color as salesperson A's clothes.
③Between fruit B and salesperson A, there is another green fruit.
What is this green fruit?

①Two items with the exact same price appear in the video.
②Consider the item among these two that is placed further away from the store entrance.
What is its original price? (Select the matching number)

Consider an item A in the video that satisfies the following conditions:
①It is yellow.
②It is not located under the stall section labeled "vegetable".
What are the two English letters written on its packaging bag?

In a window that ①has a red flag hanging and ②has three distinct price tags, calculate the following:
Take ③the highest price among these three tags and subtract ④the price of the strawberries.
What is the result?

There is a window that ①has three distinct price tags and ②sells a lot of fried chicken.
③Find the box of fried chicken whose price matches the second-highest price among the three tags. (Note: There are two boxes of fried chicken with this same price).
What is the price of the box on the left among these two?

①Identify the number at the bottom-left corner of the purple vegetable label as x.
②Among all the large hanging shop signs, count the letters in the word starting with B as y.
What is x + y?

①In the bread section, there is a flag made of three colors.
②Let x be the first digit on the far left of the label where this flag is located.
③Let y be the last digit on the label of another orange, long-shaped vegetable.
What is x * y?

①There are two items placed right next to each other.
②Their price difference is 200.
③The item on the right has a lighter color.
What is the color of their price tags?

Find an item that satisfies the following:
①The packaging is white.
②The item itself is brownish-yellow.
③Every item has the number 100 on it.
What is the price of this item?

①There is an item of which the protagonist takes two.
②Let x be the price of the item to the right of this item.
③Let y be the price of the purple vegetable in the video.
What is x + y?

①The color of the shopping cart in the video is A.
②There is a scene with 4 bottled products that look the same but have different colors.
③The first letter on their label is A (the color name).
What is the color of the leftmost bottle among these four?

①There is a bottled product A.
②The product to its right is red.
③The product directly above it is green.
What is the price of product A?

There is a product that satisfies:
①The product immediately to its right is black.
②It is composed mainly of white and color A.
③Color A is the same as the color of a product with the 'elf' trademark.
What is the first large letter on the top-left of this product's packaging?

①There is a distinct logo of shape A on the shopping cart.
②There is another logo in the video that also has shape A.
③The border color of this second logo matches the paper color on the Burt's Bees shelf.
What is the first letter on the left of this logo?

①There is a product whose trademark name starts with 'f' and ②ends with 'e'.
③Among these identical products, the main packaging color is not white.
What is the color of the font for this trademark name?

There is a product satisfying:
①The main color is white.
②There is a wood-colored product to its right.
③To the left of this product, there is a sign with a portrait of a person.
What is the race of this person?

There is an object that satisfies:
①It can be used to store things.
②It has a total of three layers.
③The top layer holds mainly white objects.
What is stored on the bottom layer of this object?

There is a product that satisfies:
①Its color is the same as the protagonist's pants.
②The first letter on the top left is S.
③In one scene, it is placed under a purple-packaged object.
What is the last letter on the bottom right of this product?

There is a shelf layer that satisfies:
①The shelf above it and the shelf to its right have the same color.
②The surface color of this shelf is A.
③On the same level directly opposite, there is also a product with color A.
What is the color of the product to the left of that product?

①There is a sign with the word 'love' and a person A on it.
Another product satisfies:
②It is located on the second shelf from the bottom.
③The person on the package of the product next to it has the same skin color as A.
Besides white, what is the other color on this product's packaging?

There is a product that satisfies:
①Its packaging has grey components.
②It is placed next to a black product.
③Its color matches the shopping cart.
How many such products are there on the shelf with complete packaging (excluding display items)?

There is a product that satisfies:
①It has the letter N on it.
②The product to its left is color A, and to its right is color B.
③The main color of the Burt's Bees product the protagonist held earlier was also A.
④The main color of the product labeled 'Little Trees' is B.
How many such products are there on the shelf with complete packaging (excluding display items)?

There is a team that satisfies:
①They have a center-back wearing jersey number 4.
②This center-back is wearing yellow-green shoes.
③The opposing team's number 9 forward scored a goal.
What is the jersey color of this team's goalkeeper?

There is a team where:
①A scoring player A has a jersey name ending with the letter N.
②Another scoring player B has a digit in his jersey number that is also present in player A's jersey number.
③When player B scores, what is the jersey number of the player raising both arms in celebration?

There is a player who satisfies:
①He is Moroccan.
②He has the number 1 on his jersey.
③He scored a goal in the video.
Which team did he score against?

There is a team that satisfies:
①Their jersey is red.
②The jersey has the Adidas logo.
③The captain scores in the match.
What is the sum of the jersey numbers of all the players from this team who scored in that match?

①A player scored a long-range goal from outside the box.
②At the same time, there was Chinese text on the pitch-side advertising board.
③The first digit of this player's jersey number is x.
④In another match, a team conceded x goals. What is the position of the player wearing number x on that team?

①When Manchester United scored their second goal, a United player was visible outside the box witnessing the goal.
②When Manchester United scored their first goal, what was the jersey number of the player to the right-rear of this player?

A team satisfies:
①Their jersey is red.
②A scoring player has the number 3 on his jersey.
③What is the jersey number of the player who provided the assist for this team's second goal?

A team satisfies:
①They scored three goals.
②One player scored two of them.
What was the posture of this player after scoring his last goal?

There is a player who satisfies:
①He is English.
②He scored a goal.
How many total goals were scored in the match involving this player?

①At the start, a player held a jersey.
②The player behind this player is A.
③This player (A) kicked a long ball after kickoff. Which position player from the green team headed this ball?

①After kickoff, player A passed the ball back and it went out of bounds.
②Later, green team player B blocked a cross.
③The cross was made with the right foot by an opponent.
④The block happened inside the box and went out for a throw-in.
What is the sum of player A's and player B's jersey numbers?

①A player from the red and white team made two consecutive crosses with his right foot.
②Each cross was successfully defended by a different player.
③Regarding the player who successfully defended the first cross, what is his nationality?

①At the start, flames were released, and the number of flames released the first time was x.
②For the green team's player number x, the player to his left in the formation is player B.
What is player B's jersey number?

①During an attack, some green team players combined on the left flank.
②The final shot/pass was completed by a German player.
What was the jersey number of the player who made the penultimate pass in this attack?

①In the video, player A completed two shots.
②For the second shot, the player who passed to him was B.
What is the sum of player A and B's jersey numbers?

①In the video, there is a goal where only three passes were made starting from the center-back's first forward pass until the shot.
②The scoring player's number is x.
③During this attack, a white team defender fell down; his number is y.
What is y - x?

①There is a goal scored with the left foot in the video.
②This was not from a set-piece. The scoring player's number is x.
③Later, a white team player fell, resulting in a penalty. This player's number is y.
What is x / y?

①There were x penalties in total in this match.
②The player who committed the foul for the second penalty is A.
③Later, a pass from player A created a scoring chance, which was wasted by player B (number y).
What is x + y?

There is a player A who satisfies:
①He provided an assist for player B to score.
②He missed a scoring opportunity.
③Player B was once fouled by another player C.
What is the first letter of player C's name on his jersey?

①When the blue team took a penalty, the white team player furthest to the right on screen was number x.
②When the white team took a penalty, the blue team player furthest to the left on screen was number y.
What is y - x?

There is a sign satisfying:
①The pattern is generally triangular.
②The label has two identical letters.
③Its background color is A.
Another sign also satisfies:
④Its background is also color A.
⑤It also has two identical letters.
What is the last letter on this second sign?

①The first person filmed passing the yellow and black obstacle in the video wears clothes of color A.
②Later, when a child wearing pants of color A jumps over an obstacle,
③a spectator wearing color A is watching.
What is the color of the shirt of the person to the right of this spectator (from the video's perspective, not the spectator's)?

①In the video, a trademark starting with V has a background color A.
②A spectator wearing brown pants and a hat of color A is watching.
What kind of pants is the person to the right of this spectator wearing?

①In the video, a person wears a bandana of color A.
②A person wearing both shirt and pants of color A swings across a bar.
③When he swings past the bar, what color shoes is the person to his left wearing?

There is a person satisfying:
①Their shirt color is similar to the sky color in the video.
②Their pants color is the same as the background color of a trademark starting with F.
What color are the pants of the person who appears immediately after this person in the video?

There is a person satisfying:
①He did a flip.
②After landing, he rolled once.
③This person's clothes are made of two colors, one is black.
What is the other color?

①In the video, a person is shirtless and wears shorts of color A.
②The next parkour athlete appearing immediately after him wears clothes of color A.
What is the color of the clothes of the parkour athlete appearing after that athlete?

①In the video, a person wears a shirt ending with the letter H, and the shirt is color A.
②Another sign has a white background,
③black font,
④and the first English letter is not V.
What is the second English letter on this sign?

There is a person who:
①Made a mistake during parkour.
②Landed smoothly after a flip.
③In the shot where he lands, what color is the hat worn by the person closest to the camera?

There is a type of chair that satisfies:
①It is outdoors.
②It has more than one color.
③There are two identical ones.
What is the color of the back of this chair?

①There is a lamp at the entrance to the house; the color of its main body is A.
There is also a table satisfying:
②The table legs are also color A.
③There are plants on the table.
How many legs does this table have?

①There is a type of chair of which there are six identical ones; the legs of these chairs are color A.
②The house has a door handle which is also color A.
③If a person faces this door looking from inside to outside, what is the most prominent thing on the ground outside?

Chair A satisfies:
①It faces the window directly.
②There is more than one chair identical to Chair A.
③It is placed on a carpet.
④If a person sits on this chair, what space is to their right?

If a person sits in a seat satisfying:
①They can see a painting without turning their head.
②There is a glass table in front of them.
③There is a green plant to their front-left.
How many chairs are in the space (room/living room/bedroom) to this person's left?

①If a person stands in the dining room facing the kitchen, the refrigerator is in position x relative to them.
If another person stands on a bed that has ②white sheets and ③red stripes,
④facing the foot of the bed,
what is the other space located in position x relative to them?

If a space satisfies:
①The walls are mainly pink.
②There is a mirror.
③If a person stands facing the mirror, what color is the cabinet in front of them?

①If a person stands in a bathroom with pink wallpaper,
②facing the mirror.
③What is placed on the top shelf of the cabinet to their rear-right?

If a chair satisfies:
①It has wooden armrests.
②From the front, you can see a bed and two windows.
③A cloakroom is very close to its left.
If a person sits on this chair, on which side is the white cabinet in the room?

①If a person stands in front of a mirror facing it,
②and there is an article of clothing immediately to their right.
③Then, relative to this person, in which direction is the room with the blue-based bathtub?

①If a person lies on an outdoor lounge chair,
②and the main door of the house is to their right,
③what color is the chair cushion besides blue?

There is a type of chair that satisfies:
①It is in the living room.
②It is on the first floor.
③Multiple chairs are placed around the same table.
④There is a pot of flowers on this table.
How many of these identical chairs are placed around this table?

①If a person stands at the door leading from the outdoor pool to the living room, facing indoors,
②the largest painting in the living room is at position x relative to the person.
③If another person sits on the sofa facing the TV directly, what is in their x position?

There is an object that satisfies:
①It is black.
②It is taller than the female protagonist.
③If a person stands facing this object, in which direction is the TV?

A sofa satisfies:
①It has multiple cushions.
②The color of one type of cushion matches the color of a stool in the sofa area.
③If a person sits on this sofa facing outdoors, in which direction is the floor lamp in that area?

There is a space that satisfies:
①It has more than one mirror.
②It has large windows.
③It is on the second floor.
④If a person stands in this space facing the window, what space is to their right?

If a sitting area satisfies:
①It has more than one cushion.
②There is a TV nearby.
③It is placed on a carpet.
④One type of cushion has a color similar to the lounge chair by the pool.
How many such cushions are there?

In a shot:
①There is a bald man in the shot.
②The camera points towards the Newcastle team bench.
③At this moment, there is a man on the bench.
④He is not wearing purely black clothes.
What is his action right now?

①The player who touched the ball first at kickoff is player A.
②After the goalkeeper kicked a long ball,
③player number 19 challenged for a header.
④If a person stands at player 19's position facing the Newcastle goal, what is the position of player A relative to this person?

If a player satisfies:
①He is a black player.
②His preferred foot is the right foot.
③He raised his hand to signal in the video.
How did this attack end after this player signaled?

①A player was fouled while turning.
②He was wearing orange pants. Let the first digit of his jersey number be x.
③During this attack, a Newcastle player opened both arms; his jersey number is y.
What is x + y?

①A player performed a heel shot, and the defender marking him was player A.
②The Tottenham center-forward is player B.
③Before player number 20 took the corner kick,
④if a person stands at player A's position facing the Tottenham goal, where is player B relative to this person?

①A long-range shot from Newcastle missed the near post.
②During this attack, when the Newcastle player took the shot, how many Newcastle players were in an offside position in the shot?

①When player 41 took a long shot, Tottenham player A stepped up to block.
②Player A was closest to player 41. Let A's jersey number be x.
③Another player scored from a rebound after a teammate's header; his jersey number is y.
What is x + y?

①In an attack, the referee cleverly dodged the passing lane from player A to player B.
②Eventually, the ball went into the net in this attack.
③The first digit of player A's jersey number is x.
④From the moment the referee dodged the ball until the goal, y players touched the ball.
What is x + y?

①Player A cut past a defender after receiving a through ball and scored.
②The defender marking him fell down.
③Player A also had a long shot that missed the goal. When he took that shot, excluding the goalkeeper, which position player from the white team was the furthest back?

①The number of steps on the stairs entering the house is x.
②After walking up the steps, there are y layers of shelves on the protagonist's left.
③There are a total of z sofas in the living room.
What is x + y + z?

①The main color of the room's sink is A.
②At the same time, among the seats in the living room, there is a cushion whose color is also A.
③If a person sits on this chair, what is on their left?

Suppose a person is sitting in a spot that satisfies the following:
①There are windows on both the left and rear sides.
②The seat is black.
③If a person sits in this spot, in what direction is the restroom relative to them?

①There is a painting A near the living room door.
②If a person stands facing the painting, the direction of the sink relative to them is x.
③If a person sits on the pink chair on the second floor, what is in their x direction?

①There is a number above the entrance door, its color is A, and the last digit is x.
②Find a shelf with y layers, where an object of color A is placed on the second layer from the bottom.
What is x - y?

①A person stands facing an old-fashioned fireplace, and the stool to their front-left is color A. 
If a person stands in front of a sink on the second floor that is ②mainly color A, ③what is on their right?

①The chair closest to the door after entering is A. Object B satisfies: ②It is in the living room, ③is mainly white, and ④has a black object on top of it. 
⑤If a person sits on chair A, what direction is object B relative to them?

There is a seating area that satisfies: ①It is in the living room, ②has other objects placed on it, and ③is dark-colored. 
④If a person sits in this place facing the TV, in what direction is the door of the house relative to them?

There is a seat in the room that satisfies: ①There are multiple identical seats, ②they are placed on the first floor, and ③the one closest to the window is called A. 
④If a person sits on the yellow chair in the living room, in what direction is A relative to this person?

A player satisfies: ①He follows the referee at the beginning, and ②the mascot child he is holding hands with wears red shoes. This player's number is x. 
③There is another player whose number is x - 12, and ④he is Portuguese. 
What is the shoe color of the mascot child led by this Portuguese player?

There is a player A who satisfies: ①Has long hair, ②wears pink shoes. 
③At the beginning, during West Ham United's long-shot attack, this player switched defensive marks. What is the jersey number of the player he was initially defending?

There is a player in the video who: ①Cuts inside from the left wing, ②takes a shot, and ③the shot is saved by the goalkeeper. 
In the one-on-one scene before cutting inside, what is the jersey number of the player defending him?

A player satisfies: ①Completed a shot with his right foot, and ②the first letter of the name on his jersey is S. This player's number is x. 
③In another corner kick attack, a Manchester United defender completed a shot with his foot, and his number is y. 
What is y - x?

There is a player who: ①Has played for both teams, and ②had a touch of the ball in his own penalty area. 
③After this touch, the next player to touch the ball is A. What is player A's jersey number?

In one attack: ①Player A passed the ball to Player B, ②Player B made a pass switching the play from the right flank to the left flank, and ③the ball eventually went out over the end line. 
What is Player B's jersey number minus Player A's jersey number?

①During an attack, a West Ham United player's hand was injured. 
②At this time, the player defending him was player A. 
③During West Ham United's first goal, what is the jersey number of the West Ham player closest to player A?

In one scene, two players A and B ①shake hands together. 
②Both players have the digit 2 in their jersey numbers, and ③the white player B is taller. 
④The last person to have physical contact with player B before this was player C. What is player C's jersey number?

①The first digit of the jersey number of the player who scored West Ham's first goal is x. Another player satisfies: 
②His jersey number also contains the digit x, and ③he had a shot blocked inside the penalty area. 
What is the other digit in this player's jersey number besides x?

①There was a goal where the goalkeeper was nutmegged. 
②At the exact moment the assisting player passed the ball, the jersey number of the last defender of the white team was x. At this time, there is a player in the frame whose ③jersey number's two digits sum to x, and ④he is located to the front-left of the referee (who is facing the white team's goal). 
Where is this player located at this moment?
answer_choice_3: At the top of the penalty arc
answer: At the top of the penalty arc

question: A player satisfies: ①Immediately picked up the ball after his team conceded a goal, and ②subsequently took the ball on offense and scored. ③After this goal, a teammate patted him. What is the jersey number of this teammate?

A player satisfies: ①He is a player of the red team, and ②fell to the ground after scoring a goal. The player who passed him the ball during this attack is A. ③Player A later completed a block. What is the jersey number of the player who was blocked?

A shot satisfies: ①The No. 1 player is in the free-throw lane, and ②a player is dunking. At this moment, the player to the left of the No. 1 player is player A. ③Later, another No. 1 player B scores a layup after spinning. In what direction is player A relative to player B at this time?
A shot attempt satisfies: ①It is inside the three-point line, and ②is on the right side of the screen. In this attack, the player setting the screen is player A. What is player A's jersey number?

An attack satisfies: ①The offensive player first fakes a drive to the left, ②then fakes a drive to the right, and ③finally shoots and scores. For the shooting player A and the defending player B, what is the absolute difference between their jersey numbers?

An attack satisfies: ①A player wearing red shoes completes an excellent defensive play, and ②his teammate subsequently shoots and scores. ③After this shot goes in, what is the shoe color of the first player to touch the ball?

①A player falls to the ground after shooting, and ②he subsequently tries to defend the opponent but fails. ③At the exact moment this player's defense is breached, what is the shoe color of the red team player closest to the baseline?

①Player number x scored a goal, defended by player number y, and ②x - y = 10. ③In another attack, when player x competes with player 30 for a rebound, what is the shoe color of the red team player farthest from the baseline?

In one scene, ①two people walk over to celebrate with player A. ②These two people share an identical digit on their jerseys, and ③one of them has a name ending in the letter T. What is the first letter of the name on player A's jersey?

①During an attack, player No. 4 stands on the Super Bowl logo to catch the ball. ②In this attack, the ball is eventually kicked out of bounds. ③When this player catches the ball, what is the jersey number of the teammate closest to him in front of him?

①In an attack, a player retreats into his own end zone before passing the ball forward. ②The receiving player immediately falls to the ground. ③The moment the receiving player stands up, what is the jersey number of the teammate to his left?

①In one shot, the NE team's score is x. ②The player with number x is also in the frame, standing near the 10-yard line. At this time, a player satisfies: ③He is a SEA team player, and ④he remains relatively close to the front-left of player x. What is this player's jersey number?

①During an attack, player number x tackles player number y to the ground, and ②x + y = 40. ③Between the two, the first letter on player x's jersey is M. What is the last digit of player y's jersey number?

①Once the quarterback catches the ball and runs straight forward. ②In this attack, there were originally x players charging straight toward the opponent's end line. ③Find the y-yard line on the field, where y = x * 10 + 10. Approximately how many yards away from this line is the player when he falls to the ground?

A player A satisfies: ①The first letter of his name is B, and ②he once stood shoulder-to-shoulder with an opposing player B. ③The two digits of player B's jersey number are the same. What is the last letter of player A's name?

In one scene: ①Player A and Player B are in the same frame. ②Both players' jersey numbers consist of repeated identical digits (e.g., 22, 33). ③Player A is the one with the larger number. ④Relative to Player A, the teammate of Player A positioned in front of Player A is Player C. What is Player C's jersey number?

①When SEA's number 7 walks toward the bench, x players walk past and overtake him. In another attack, ②there are only x players behind the 35-yard line, and ③the quarterback passes the ball to his front-right. Around which yard line does this attack eventually conclude?
During an attack: ①The quarterback throws a long pass to his front-right. ②The teammate fails to catch it, and ③a defensive player falls down. Approximately at what yard line does the ball land?

In one shot: ①Two referees open their arms simultaneously, and ②then walk in opposite directions. ③When both referees open their arms simultaneously, the player near the sideline on the bottom-right of the screen is A. What is player A's jersey number?

During an attack: ①The quarterback passes the ball to his front-right. ②The receiving player runs forward and crosses midfield. ③The jersey of the player who successfully makes the final tackle contains the digit 2. Approximately how many yards did the receiving player advance?

Object A in the video satisfies: ①It is black, and ②it has three legs. ③If a person stands at object A and faces the entrance of the house where the object is located, in what direction is the staircase leading to the second floor relative to this person?

①Person A is wearing a green hat when entering the door. Person B, upon entering, satisfies: ②She is behind and to the left of person A, ③has black hair, and ④is female. ⑤Later, when the man wearing a blue-and-white hat sits on the sofa and a three-stripe visual effect appears on the screen, ⑥the person to the left of person B is person C. What color are person C's pants?

①In the living room to the front-right after entering the main door, there are x pillows that are entirely dark blue. ②Another painting mainly consists of x identical objects A, and ③its background is black. What is the rightmost English letter on object A in this painting?

①When the people in green clothes shake hands with a person in black clothes and black pants, the second person to shake his hand is A. ②When an exclamation mark appears next to the person wearing the green hat, what is A doing with a female?
